summary.text: Retail Sales Associate and Cashier with customer service experience supporting shoppers, explaining products, processing POS transactions, stocking inventory, receiving shipments, and maintaining a clean sales floor. Available weekdays and weekends.

lines.text: Customer service, POS, payment processing, product selection
Inventory, receiving, clean sales floor, communication, teamwork

bullets.text: Assisted customers with product selection and answered questions about store merchandise.
Processed POS transactions, payments, returns, and exchanges at checkout.
Stocked shelves, received shipments, and organized back-room inventory.
Maintained a clean sales floor and product displays while working with teammates during busy store hours.
